name: idle1_loop
frames: Pose: standing relaxed in a neutral idle pose, arms hanging naturally at her sides, eyes open, soft neutral smile, body at its lowest resting point of a breathing cycle.
Pose: standing relaxed, mid-inhale of a gentle breathing cycle, chest and shoulders lifted very slightly, eyes open, soft neutral smile.
Pose: standing relaxed at the top of a gentle inhale, shoulders slightly raised, body a touch taller, eyes open, soft neutral smile, hair lifted very slightly.
Pose: standing relaxed, beginning to exhale, shoulders easing down, eyes half-closed in a sleepy blink, gentle smile.
Pose: standing relaxed, mid-exhale, shoulders settling down, eyes fully closed in a calm blink, content gentle smile.
Pose: standing relaxed, exhale finishing, shoulders low, eyes still closed, peaceful gentle smile, hair settling.
Pose: standing relaxed, eyes reopening halfway from a blink, shoulders at rest, soft neutral smile.
Pose: standing relaxed, eyes open again, starting a tiny new inhale, shoulders barely lifting, soft neutral smile.
Pose: standing relaxed in a neutral idle pose almost identical to the first frame, arms at her sides, eyes open, soft neutral smile, body at its lowest resting point.
